subject: rename(branding): budgy-ting → Farlume across entire codebase
body:
Rename the app from budgy-ting to Farlume in all user-facing text,
package metadata, PWA manifest, localStorage keys, database name,
export filenames, debug report header, and documentation.

GitHub repo name (devmade-ai/budgy-ting) references in SESSION_NOTES
and AI_MISTAKES are kept as-is since they refer to the repo, not the app.

Also includes AI_MISTAKES entries from earlier in this session
documenting planning workflow failures.

Tags: branding, rename, pwa, db, docs
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: farlume-rebrand
Semver: major
